description_long: This is a male security guard dressed in a formal, dark green suit with a white shirt and black tie, exuding a professional and authoritative presence. He wears black shoes and dark sunglasses, adding to his vigilant and stern demeanor. His arms are crossed firmly over his chest, suggesting a posture of alertness and control. The suit is tailored and features subtle shading to indicate fabric folds and structure, with no visible insignia or equipment attached. His hair is neatly styled and he has a clean-shaven face, further emphasizing a disciplined appearance. The overall look is that of a private security professional stationed in an urban environment.
description: A male security guard in a dark green suit, white shirt, black tie, and sunglasses stands with arms crossed, projecting authority and vigilance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the security guard's crossed arms, sunglasses, and formal attire with clear facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm crossing, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit, the guard's head, and the arm position behind the torso.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, crossed arms, and the suit's side details.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal, dark green suit with matching trousers and a fitted jacket, complemented by a crisp white dress shirt and a black necktie. The uniform is completed with black dress shoes and dark sunglasses, giving a standardized and professional appearance. There is no hat or visible variation in the uniform, and the overall style is businesslike and authoritative.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms crossed over the chest, projecting a vigilant and authoritative demeanor.
